# Awesome Web Toys 1000

Last updated: 2026-04-14

## Summary (English)
1000 interactive web toys exploring generative art, simulation, animation, 3D, and playful frontend experiments.

## Summary (Traditional Chinese)
1000 interactive web toys exploring generative art, simulation, animation, 3D, and playful frontend experiments.

## Summary (Japanese)
1000 interactive web toys exploring generative art, simulation, animation, 3D, and playful frontend experiments.

## Key Pages

## Topics
- Generative art
- Physics simulations
- 3D and animation experiments
- Interactive frontend play
